narrative_votes: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
URW: Negative Consequences for the West
URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcome of the war, suggesting that it could spread to the entire world and involve many countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: वेस्ट, खासकर अमेरिका से दूर कर दिया.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the West, particularly the United States, for its handling of the COVID-19 vaccine distribution, implying that it has driven weaker countries away.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन ने खुद को नाटो में शामिल करने की अपील की.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text implies that Ukraine's decision to join NATO is a factor contributing to the war, rather than placing blame solely on Russia.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text predicts that if a ceasefire is not reached soon, the conflict between Russia and Ukraine could spread globally, involving many countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: नाटो यानी नॉर्थ अटलाटिंक ट्रीटी ऑर्गनाइजेशन वो संगठन है, जिसमें रूस का कट्टर दुश्मन अमेरिका भी शामिल है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes Western countries, particularly the US, by portraying NATO as an organization that includes Russia's 'arch-nemesis' America, implying a biased and confrontational stance.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text highlights the unequal distribution of COVID-19 vaccines as a factor that could contribute to global instability and conflict, potentially harming Western countries.
